extension.description: Multi-source subtitles addon optimized for Seren and a4kScrapers. Supports: OpenSubtitles, BSPlayer, Podnadpisi.NET, SubDL, Addic7ed
extension.news:
[v3.23.8]: * Move full release history into CHANGELOG.md so repository metadata stays compact.
[v3.23.7]: * Relax OpenSubtitles TV episode IMDb filtering in API-mode pre-play searches so valid episode subtitle results survive to Fenlight matching.
[v3.23.6]: * Add targeted search pipeline logging for API-mode pre-play debugging, including raw service results and each prepare/filter stage.
Full release history is now tracked in CHANGELOG.md.
